meta.source: Warhammer 40,000 Rules Commentary v1.5 + Core Rules FAQs v1.8
meta.description: Official clarifications, definitions, edge cases, modifiers, and FAQs

keyDefinitions.activePlayer: The player whose turn is taking place
keyDefinitions.any: Means 'one or more'. 'Within Engagement Range of any enemy units' = within Engagement Range of one or more
keyDefinitions.army: All units on Army Roster plus any added during battle
keyDefinitions.as_close_as_possible: End in base-to-base contact if move sufficient (without breaking other restrictions). If already as close as possible — cannot move but still counts as having made the move

automatically_successful.diceNotRolled: Do not roll dice — rules triggered by specific dice results do not trigger
automatically_successful.hitRoll: Not a Critical Hit — does not trigger Critical Hit effects
automatically_successful.woundRoll: Not a Critical Wound — does not trigger Critical Wound effects

keyDefinitions.base_to_base_contact: Model bases touching. If enemy model overhangs its base — models considered in base contact if: (1) move was sufficient to reach, (2) moved as close as possible, (3) any part within 1" of any part of other model
keyDefinitions.bearer: The model equipped with a weapon, Enhancement, or item of wargear
keyDefinitions.best_characteristic: Value all others are worse than or equal to. For + values: lower number is better
keyDefinitions.closest_model_unit: If two or more equally close — controlling player selects which counts as closest
keyDefinitions.critical_hit: Unmodified Hit roll of 6. Always successful. Does not trigger Critical Hit effects if using Fire Overwatch (still requires 6 due to that Stratagem's rules)
keyDefinitions.critical_wound: Unmodified Wound roll of 6. Always successful
keyDefinitions.destroyed_by: Only triggers if destroyed by: attack from model in your army, mortal wound from your army's rule, or other rule explicitly stating it destroys the unit
keyDefinitions.different_model_unit: A model/unit other than the one specified — different instances of same datasheet are still 'other' units
keyDefinitions.hull: When measuring to/from VEHICLES without bases or models without bases — measure to closest part of model (or base if it has one)
keyDefinitions.immediately: Resolve before anything else happens (same as 'just after')
keyDefinitions.just_after: Resolved before anything else happens — can interrupt normal sequences like attack sequence or charge sequence
keyDefinitions.or_better_saves: Lower number before + sign is better. 2+ is better than 3+
keyDefinitions.or_worse_saves: Higher number before + sign is worse. 3+ is worse than 2+
keyDefinitions.or_better_other: Higher number is better for Strength, Toughness, Wounds, etc.
keyDefinitions.remained_stationary: Units on battlefield at start of Movement phase not selected to move in Move Units step count as Remained Stationary
keyDefinitions.unit_coherency_removed: Models removed for being out of coherency count as destroyed but do NOT trigger rules triggered when model is destroyed
keyDefinitions.within: Any distance not more than that distance. 'Within 1"' = any distance not more than 1" away
keyDefinitions.wholly_within_model: Every part of base (or hull) is within that distance
keyDefinitions.wholly_within_unit: Every model in unit is wholly within that distance
keyDefinitions.wounds_lost: Lose wounds equal to attack Damage. If Damage characteristic includes operator (e.g. D6+1) — the +1 is part of the characteristic, not a modifier

attackClarifications.additionalHits: Additional hits from Critical Hit (e.g. SUSTAINED HITS) are automatically successful — not Critical Hits themselves, do not trigger Critical Hit effects
attackClarifications.lethal_hits_and_devastating_wounds: Lethal Hits auto-wounds. That auto-wound is not a Critical Wound — does not trigger Devastating Wounds
attackClarifications.lethal_hits_and_sustained_hits: Additional hits from Sustained Hits do not benefit from Lethal Hits
attackClarifications.fast_dice_rolling_reroll: Can roll multiple at once then decide which to re-roll (if rule allows one re-roll)
attackClarifications.target_no_longer_eligible: If target stops being eligible after selected — attacking/charging unit can select new targets
attackClarifications.mortal_wounds_order: Normal damage always resolved before mortal wounds from same attack, even if normal damage saved
attackClarifications.devastating_wounds_allocated_last: Critical Wounds with Devastating Wounds allocated after all other attacks from unit resolved

movementClarifications.count_as_normal_move: Units arriving from Reserves/disembarking from moved TRANSPORT count as having made Normal move. They have NOT made a Normal move — cannot trigger Stratagems/abilities that trigger 'after unit makes Normal move'
movementClarifications.fall_back_then_returned: If unit Falls Back then is repositioned — still counts as Fallen Back
movementClarifications.models_can_overhang_edge: Models can overhang battlefield edge provided base/hull is wholly on battlefield
movementClarifications.tilting_base_overhang: If model too large to set up wholly within area — set up so base/hull is touching battlefield edge. Cannot shoot, charge, move, or Remain Stationary that turn
movementClarifications.vehicles_with_bases: Measure to closest part of model (base or hull). In base contact when within 0" horizontally and 5" vertically

chargeClarifications.charge_bonus: Fights First from charging is Charge bonus. Other rules triggered when charging are NOT Charge bonus
chargeClarifications.has_charged: If unit makes Charge move — unit and every model in it is said to have charged until end of turn
chargeClarifications.has_been_charged: If unit was target of successful charge — unit and every model is said to have been charged until end of turn

fightPhaseClarifications.consolidate_mandatory: Consolidation is not optional. Whether individual models move during Consolidation IS optional
fightPhaseClarifications.consolidate_without_moving: If no models actually moved (already in base contact or chose not to) — unit still counts as having Consolidated
fightPhaseClarifications.fight_on_death: Resolved before attacking unit Consolidates and before other destruction triggers. Model assumes 1 wound remaining. After fighting, other triggers fire, then model removed — it does NOT Consolidate
fightPhaseClarifications.individual_model_fighting: When rule lets one model fight: can Pile In (must end in Unit Coherency), make attacks, Consolidate (must end in Unit Coherency)

stratagemClarifications.affected_by_stratagem: Unit targeted by Stratagem is 'affected by' it. New Orders Stratagem targets Secondary Mission card — not any unit, so always usable even if all units Battle-shocked
stratagemClarifications.battle_shocked_stratagem: Effects of Stratagems already applied do NOT stop when unit becomes Battle-shocked
stratagemClarifications.cp_gained_from_mission_cards: CP from discarding Secondary Mission cards counts toward battle round CP limit
stratagemClarifications.fire_overwatch_monster_vehicle: Big Guns Never Tire applies in controlling player's Shooting phase only. MONSTER/VEHICLE locked in combat cannot use Fire Overwatch
stratagemClarifications.rites_of_battle_faq: Abilities without specific Stratagem name: reduce cost by 1CP instead of 0CP. Cannot grant ability to use same Stratagem twice in phase

reservesClarifications.strategic_reserves_vs_reserves: All Strategic Reserves are Reserves but not all Reserves are Strategic Reserves. Restrictions on Reserves apply to Strategic Reserves too
reservesClarifications.reserves_eligibility_to_shoot: Units in Reserves ARE eligible to shoot — but cannot actually shoot unless they have a target
reservesClarifications.aircraft_reserves: AIRCRAFT in Reserves at Declare Battle Formations step NOT counted toward Strategic Reserves limits. Treated as Strategic Reserves once battle starts
reservesClarifications.deep_strike_from_strategic_reserves: Player can choose Deep Strike placement OR Strategic Reserves placement when arriving from Strategic Reserves

objectiveClarifications.control_timing: Control determined at end of any phase or turn. Cannot control before end of first Command phase (all start contested)
objectiveClarifications.objective_secured_clarification: Even with Objective Secured ability — control determined at end of each phase/turn. Opponent gains control if their Level of Control is greater at end of any phase/turn

transportClarifications.embarked_units: Embarked units do NOT count as on battlefield. Cannot do anything or be targeted unless rule explicitly states so
transportClarifications.embarked_fall_back: If unit Falls Back and all conditions met — can embark in TRANSPORT even outside Movement phase, unless explicitly stated otherwise
transportClarifications.firing_deck_advanced: TRANSPORT with Firing Deck can use weapons from units that Fell Back or Advanced this turn (those unit's restrictions don't apply to TRANSPORT)
transportClarifications.rapid_ingress_transport: If TRANSPORT arrives via Rapid Ingress — units embarked within cannot disembark that phase

commandPhaseClarifications.command_step_timing: Stratagems used in Command phase without specifying 'Battle-shock step' or 'end of Command phase' are always used in Command step
commandPhaseClarifications.battle_shock_tests_limit: Cannot take more than one Battle-shock test per unit in Battle-shock step. Can take more in other phases and Command step
commandPhaseClarifications.warlord_cp_exception: Rules granting more than 1CP at once per battle (e.g. Code Chivalric) explicitly ignore per-round CP limit

modifiers.order: 1. Change/replace characteristic to specified value. 2. Division modifiers. 3. Multiplication modifiers. 4. Addition modifiers. 5. Subtraction modifiers. 6. Round fractions up
modifiers.hitRollModifiers: Cannot be modified by more than -1 or +1 total
modifiers.woundRollModifiers: Cannot be modified by more than -1 or +1 total
modifiers.savingThrowImprovement: Cannot be improved by more than +1
modifiers.cpCostMinimum: CP cost of Stratagem cannot be modified below 0CP

characteristicsMinimums.Save: Cannot be 1+ or better after modifiers
characteristicsMinimums.WS_BS: Cannot be 1+ or better after modifiers
characteristicsMinimums.Leadership: Cannot be 4+ or better, or 9+ or worse after modifiers

improvingVsWorsening.improving_saves_WS_BS: Subtract from number before + sign. 3+ improved by 1 = 2+
improvingVsWorsening.worsening_saves_WS_BS: Add to number before + sign. 3+ worsened by 1 = 4+
improvingVsWorsening.improving_AP: Subtract from characteristic. AP -1 improved by 1 = AP -2. AP 0 improved by 1 = AP -1
improvingVsWorsening.worsening_AP: Add to characteristic, max 0. AP -1 worsened by 1 = AP 0

modifiers.duplicatedCoreAbilities: If model has multiple instances of same Core ability — not cumulative. Only one instance takes effect. If ability has number (SUSTAINED HITS 1, Scouts 6") — player chooses which to use each time

visibilityClarifications.ruins_and_vehicles: For VEHICLE models (not WALKER with base) or models without bases — use every part of model including base (if it has one) to determine within/wholly within ruins. For all other models — use the base only, except for overhanging parts which are ignored for visibility purposes
visibilityClarifications.model_fully_visible: For purposes of determining if enemy unit fully visible — observing model can see through other models in unit being observed

miscFAQ.fire_overwatch_closest_target: Yes — if it is the closest unengaged, visible enemy unit
miscFAQ.damage_to_zero_and_negative_modifier: Change to 0 takes effect first, then modifiers applied (e.g. MELTA 2 on weapon set to 0 damage = final damage 2)
miscFAQ.multiple_conditions_rules: Second condition must be met alongside first for improved rule. Both conditions required
miscFAQ.shoot_or_fight_after_destroyed: That model's unit does NOT count as having been selected to shoot or fight — no associated triggers
miscFAQ.warlord_model_not_unit: Attacks against Attached unit containing CHARACTER models that are not EPIC HEROES — yes can be allocated to CHARACTER if not Attached
miscFAQ.consolidation_toward_objective: Can move in any direction as long as ends closer to objective marker and remains within range
miscFAQ.psyker_hazardous: Yes — mortal wounds from failed Hazardous test using Psychic weapon count as Psychic Attacks
miscFAQ.devastating_wounds_melta: If Damage changed to 0 then MELTA adds to it — final Damage is the MELTA bonus value
